textPlain: In other circles they call this "functional overlay": where people who suffer an injury (mental or physical) and alter their behavior such that the altered behavior persists after the injury heals.
Pretty sure I saw this episode of the twilight zone. No, actually I think it was Sapphire & Steel.
“I fought the law, and the law won.”RIP Sonny Curtis
Is this study reproducible?If not it’s another example of the crisis in psychology: https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Replication_crisis
